name: The Installers
description: TheInstallers specializes in professional carpet installation, emphasizing their extensive experience and expertise to ensure high-quality results. They offer a comprehensive process that includes measurements, removal of existing flooring, and the careful installation of carpet and padding, all backed by a 1-year warranty for customer satisfaction.

name: Superior Corporation of Illinois
description: Superior Installations offers comprehensive carpet installation services, emphasizing the importance of selecting high-quality carpet suited for your home's traffic and activity levels. Their expertise includes guidance on carpet materials and maintenance, ensuring a durable and long-lasting flooring solution.

name: The Carpet Center Inc
description: The Carpet Center specializes in carpet installation, along with a variety of other flooring solutions such as tile and luxury vinyl. They are dedicated to providing quality materials and superior installations, making them a valuable resource for both commercial and residential projects.

name: The Carpet Store Kitchener
description: The Carpet Store specializes in carpet installation and offers a comprehensive range of flooring solutions. With over 30 years of experience, they provide free estimates and expert installation services, ensuring a seamless process for customers.

name: Carpet Mill
description: Carpet Mill Flooring Centre specializes in a wide range of flooring products and services, including carpet installation. Their professional and experienced installers are dedicated to exceptional customer service and attention to detail, ensuring a high-quality installation experience.

name: Carpet Logistics
description: Carpet Logistics is a leading provider of carpet installation services in Melbourne, specializing in both residential and commercial projects. With a team of over 30 professional carpet layers and a comprehensive range of services including floor preparation and furniture removal, they ensure a smooth and efficient installation process.

name: Capital Carpet & Flooring Specialists Inc
description: Capital Carpet & Flooring Specialists specializes in carpet installation, having successfully completed millions of square yards of projects across New England, ranging from conference rooms to municipal spaces. Their experienced craftsmen ensure high-quality application and installation, making them well-equipped to handle various commercial flooring needs.

name: Metro Carpets LLC.
description: Metro Carpets, LLC specializes in high-quality carpet installations and offers free estimates, ensuring exceptional customer experiences. With over 40 years of experience and a dedicated team, they manage flooring projects of any size, honoring manufacturer warranties.

name: The Carpet Workroom
description: The Carpet Workroom specializes in custom carpet solutions, including residential and commercial carpet installation. Their certified team ensures high-quality installations, transforming clients' visions into reality with personalized service.

name: INSTALL
description: INSTALL is a certification program for flooring installation professionals that ensures high-quality installations through standardized training and expertise. Their network of trained contractors has successfully completed numerous projects, including large-scale renovations and specialized installations, making them a reliable resource for any carpet installation needs.
